system.description:
The Shaper may select one target that he can see. If the Shaper has previously devoured an example of the target's race, the Shaper may make a Challenging (+0) Scrutiny Test against the target as a Half Action.

If successful, the Shaper may determine the number of Wounds that the target possesses, and may further determine a number of the target's characteristic bonuses equal to the degrees of success on the Scrutiny Test. The Shaper may select which characteristic bonuses he discovers when using this ability.

The Shaper may use this ability once per target per encounter.
